properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thought of you again today Wherever you may be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know your out there in the world And I know you're meant for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though I don't know when we'll meet To me you are just a prayer I pray you're walking close to God And He will keep you in His care

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Promise me forever (forever) Forever and a day I promise I will wait for you. Oh will you wait for me? So many people come to this with only pieces I promise I'll stay true to you In everything that I do Forever… forever… forever… and a day.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So many things uncertain So shaky is the world But I am standing safely Sheltered in His hand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I know His timing is perfect And I know His will is true And so I'm growing as I wait As He's preparing me for you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Promise me forever (forever) Forever and a day I promise I will wait for you. Oh will you wait for me? So many people come to this with only pieces I promise I'll stay true to you In everything that I do.
